raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the help focus on writing/organization of the section, technical-methodological checking, or both?","rationale":{"R1.2":"The section presents a methodological chain whose internal coherence may be part of helping with it.","R1.5":"Because the delegation refers to an entire section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are plausible central responsibilities.","R1.6":"A generic request to help with a paper section centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and register.","RX.1":"Any projection should disclose uncertainty caused by the delegation's broad wording.","RX.2":"The helper must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the section and reported results support.","RX.3":"The helper must stay within helping with this section rather than expanding to unrelated paper tasks.","RX.4":"The helper should avoid changes or judgments that could mislead downstream scientific interpretation.","RX.5":"The helper should preserve traceability to the artifact's stated methods, datasets, tools, and releases."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the help focus on writing/organization of the section, technical-methodological checking, or both?

rationale.R1.2: The section presents a methodological chain whose internal coherence may be part of helping with it.
rationale.R1.5: Because the delegation refers to an entire section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are plausible central responsibilities.
rationale.R1.6: A generic request to help with a paper section centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and register.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should disclose uncertainty caused by the delegation's broad wording.
rationale.RX.2: The helper must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the section and reported results support.
rationale.RX.3: The helper must stay within helping with this section rather than expanding to unrelated paper tasks.
rationale.RX.4: The helper should avoid changes or judgments that could mislead downstream scientific interpretation.
rationale.RX.5: The helper should preserve traceability to the artifact's stated methods, datasets, tools, and releases.
